title: Příkaz mini changelog a /mini:changelog
goal: Add a 'mini changelog' command (and a read-only /mini:changelog slash command) that prints the project's CHANGELOG.md changes: by default the latest released version's section, with --all for the whole history and --unreleased for the pending Unreleased section; a missing changelog is reported gracefully.

steps.title: Changelog section parser
steps.detail: In changelog.ts add parseChangelogSections(content) -> [{heading, version, released, body}] splitting on level-2 headings, plus a selector for the latest released (dated) section and the Unreleased one; unit tests.

steps.title: mini changelog command
steps.detail: commands/changelog.ts + cli.ts registration. Bare 'mini changelog' prints the latest released section; '--all' prints the whole history; '--unreleased' prints the Unreleased section; a missing/!found CHANGELOG.md is reported gracefully. Unit tests.

steps.title: /mini:changelog slash command
steps.detail: Add a read-only 'changelog' entry to install/commands.ts (own body like status: runs 'mini changelog' and relays); bump the generated-command count (15->16) in install/update/install-commands tests.

steps.title: README and CHANGELOG
steps.detail: Document 'mini changelog' / '/mini:changelog' in README (commands table + slash list + generated file list) and add an English CHANGELOG entry.
